files.summary: Node.js WebSocket relay server. Listens on port 1337, accepts all connections without origin validation, and broadcasts every received UTF-8 message to all connected clients. Uses the legacy 'websocket' npm package with ES5 var syntax throughout.
business_rules: Broadcast all messages to all connected clients

method_breakdown.name: http.createServer callback
method_breakdown.purpose: Empty HTTP handler — no functionality

method_breakdown.name: wsServer.on('request')
method_breakdown.purpose: Accept incoming WebSocket connections; add to clients array

method_breakdown.name: connection.on('message')
method_breakdown.purpose: Receive and broadcast UTF-8 messages to all clients

method_breakdown.name: connection.on('close')
method_breakdown.purpose: Remove client from clients array on disconnect

files.summary: Main search form component. Contains hardcoded mock person and payment data (IBANs, BICs, addresses). Implements local client-side filtering, result selection, and sends selected records over WebSocket to the Swing client. Also relays textarea content over WebSocket.
business_rules: Search persons by: last name, first name, ZIP, city, street, house number (OR logic)
One payment recipient (Zahlungsempfaenger) selectable per person
Selected person + payment data transmitted to Swing desktop application via WebSocket

method_breakdown.name: connect()
method_breakdown.purpose: Establish WebSocket connection to ws://localhost:1337

method_breakdown.name: disconnect()
method_breakdown.purpose: Close WebSocket connection

method_breakdown.name: searchPerson()
method_breakdown.purpose: Filter search_space array against form inputs

method_breakdown.name: sendMessage(e, target)
method_breakdown.purpose: Serialize and send object over WebSocket with target discriminator

method_breakdown.name: selectResult(item)
method_breakdown.purpose: Set selected person result

method_breakdown.name: zahlungsempfaengerSelected(item)
method_breakdown.purpose: Set selected payment recipient

files.summary: Root Vue application component. Renders the header bar and embeds the Search component. Minimal logic.
Vue 2 application bootstrap. Creates and mounts the root Vue instance.

Legacy monolithic Swing entry point. Builds the entire UI statically, connects to WebSocket server, and manually parses incoming JSON using low-level streaming API. Contains static inner classes for WebSocket endpoint, Message, and SearchResult. Duplicates UI structure found in PocView.
business_rules: Route incoming WebSocket message to textarea or text fields based on 'target' discriminator
Display person fields: name, first name, DOB, ZIP, city, street, house number
Display payment fields: IBAN, BIC, valid_from

method_breakdown.name: main()
method_breakdown.purpose: Initialize UI and connect WebSocket

method_breakdown.name: initUI()
method_breakdown.purpose: Build Swing form layout with GridBagLayout

method_breakdown.name: onMessage()
method_breakdown.purpose: Parse JSON and populate UI fields

method_breakdown.name: extract(String json)
method_breakdown.purpose: Manual low-level JSON parsing for Message envelope

method_breakdown.name: toSearchResult(String json)
method_breakdown.purpose: Manual low-level JSON parsing for person/payment data

files.summary: Entry point for MVP-structured Swing application. Wires PocView, EventEmitter, PocModel, and PocPresenter together. Uses Java 22 unnamed variable pattern.

method_breakdown.name: main()
method_breakdown.purpose: Bootstrap MVP components and block on CountDownLatch (never released)

files.summary: HTTP service that POSTs a map of key/value pairs as JSON to a hardcoded localhost:8080 endpoint using the legacy HttpURLConnection API.

method_breakdown.name: post(Map)
method_breakdown.purpose: Serialize map to JSON, POST to /post endpoint, return response body

files.summary: Model layer holding all form field values as a typed EnumMap. Triggers HTTP POST via HttpBinService and emits result via EventEmitter.
business_rules: All form fields collected before submission
Non-empty response triggers event emission; empty response emits failure message

method_breakdown.name: PocModel(EventEmitter)
method_breakdown.purpose: Initialize all ValueModel entries in the EnumMap

method_breakdown.name: action()
method_breakdown.purpose: Collect field values, POST to backend, emit result

files.summary: Simple publish-subscribe event bus. Fans out string event data to all registered EventListener instances.

method_breakdown.name: subscribe(EventListener)
method_breakdown.purpose: Register a listener

method_breakdown.name: emit(String)
method_breakdown.purpose: Notify all registered listeners

files.summary: Enum defining all form field identifiers used as keys in PocModel's EnumMap.
Empty placeholder class — never implemented or used. Dead code.

View layer of MVP pattern. Constructs and displays the Swing form. All UI components exposed as protected fields — violates encapsulation. Adds textArea to panel twice. Does not initialize on the Event Dispatch Thread.

method_breakdown.name: PocView()
method_breakdown.purpose: Constructor — calls initUI()

method_breakdown.name: initUI()
method_breakdown.purpose: Build Swing layout; expose components as protected fields

files.summary: Presenter layer. Wires DocumentListeners and ChangeListeners to sync UI fields to model. Directly accesses protected view fields — breaks MVP contract.
business_rules: Form fields kept in sync with model on every keystroke
After action completes, all form fields cleared and female gender radio reset

method_breakdown.name: PocPresenter(PocView, PocModel, EventEmitter)
method_breakdown.purpose: Wire event handlers and bindings

method_breakdown.name: bind(JTextComponent, ModelProperties)
method_breakdown.purpose: Sync text component changes to model

method_breakdown.name: bind(JRadioButton, ModelProperties)
method_breakdown.purpose: Sync radio button changes to model

method_breakdown.name: initializeBindings()
method_breakdown.purpose: Call bind() for all form fields

files.summary: Simple generic value holder with get/set. Used as the typed container for each model property.

method_breakdown.name: getField()
method_breakdown.purpose: Return typed value

method_breakdown.name: setField(T)
method_breakdown.purpose: Set typed value
